---
title: "Research"
---

My recent research themes include:

-   Epidemic modelling for decision making
-   Real-time outbreak analytics
-   Pandemic reslience, biosecurity
-   Dimensional compression and interpretability\

## Detailed topics

### Epidemic modelling for decision making
- Designing targeted control strategies
  - Optimal vaccine allocation using approximated next-generation matrices ([Miura et al. (2021) Plos Comp Bio](https://journals.plos.org/ploscompbiol/article?id=10.1371/journal.pcbi.1009697))
  - Temporal shift in the dominant transmission route for mpox clade Ib ([Miura and Leung et al. (2026) Sci Adv](https://www.medrxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.07.18.25331780v1))
- Individual-level heterogeneity 
  - Susceptibility
  - Infectiousness 
- Policy evaluation
  - Scenario analysis
  - Effectiveness of control measures

### Real-time outbreak analytics
- Estimating key epidemiological parameters (e.g., [incubation period](https://doi.org/10.2807/1560-7917.ES.2022.27.24.2200448), [serial interval](https://academic.oup.com/jid/article/229/3/800/7103467))
- Monitoring epidemic trends
  - Nowcasting (e.g., [mpox](https://www.eurosurveillance.org/content/10.2807/1560-7917.ES.2023.28.12.2200772))
  - Effective reproduction number $R_t$ using wastewater data (see [Miyazawa et al.](https://www.eurosurveillance.org/content/10.2807/1560-7917.ES.2024.29.8.2300277) and [van Boven et al.](https://www.eurosurveillance.org/content/10.2807/1560-7917.ES.2023.28.25.2200700))
  - Short-term forecasting (see our contribution to [RespiCast, ECDC forecasting platform](https://respicast.ecdc.europa.eu/) and a preprint [Gozzi et al. (2026) medRxiv](https://www.medrxiv.org/content/10.1101/2025.10.30.25339155v2))
  
### Pandemic reslience, biosecurity
- Epidemiological archetypes 
- Disease X framework

## Projects
- [JST PRESTO](https://www.jst.go.jp/kisoken/presto/en/project/1112103/1112103_2023.html#anchor-10)
- [ESCAPE (Horizon Europe, WP4 Analytics & Tools)](https://www.escapepandemics.com/)
